scope: Live single-role click-through performed by agent as the currently-logged-in platform_admin in the preview session. compliance_analyst and requester/trader roles remain OPERATOR-VERIFY-REQUIRED — agent cannot sign in/out of preview session as other identities without hijacking the user's session.

method_disclosure.platform_admin: LIVE — driven via browser tool against /hq/facilitation with the user's currently-logged-in platform_admin account. Screenshots captured.
method_disclosure.compliance_analyst: NOT-EXECUTED-LIVE — agent has no separate credentials and will not impersonate by sign-in/out in the user's preview session. Code-level RBAC + RLS evidence retained from prior pass.
method_disclosure.requester_trader: NOT-EXECUTED-LIVE — same reason. Code-level RLS evidence retained from prior pass.

Screenshot: 02-platform-admin-case-drawer-triage.png (re-captured 2026-06-15T08:52Z after EMB-5 fix; subtitle now reads 'Review the case and run outreach', no internal role tokens).
platform_admin_live_observations.outreach_tab_renders: PASS (live) — Candidates (0), Add candidate form (Counterparty org / Contact email / Contact name / Source note), and pre-send check explanation are present. Screenshot: 03-platform-admin-case-drawer-outreach.png.
platform_admin_live_observations.templates_panel_renders: PASS (live) — 'Outreach email templates' card with empty state 'No templates available.' rendered below queue. Plain-English helper copy present. Screenshot: 04-platform-admin-templates-and-dnc-panels.png.
platform_admin_live_observations.dnc_panel_renders: PASS (live) — 'Do-not-contact rules' card with Add rule form (What to block / Value / Reason / Add rule) and 'No do-not-contact rules.' empty state. Helper copy is plain English. Screenshot: 04-platform-admin-templates-and-dnc-panels.png.
platform_admin_live_observations.previous_emb_fixes_visually_clean: PASS (live) — no raw enum codes, no edge-function slugs, and no 'non-2xx' strings observed on the rendered surfaces.

newly_observed_defects.observed: Drawer subtitle exposed internal role tokens: 'Admin triage · Phase 2 outreach surface (platform_admin / compliance_analyst)'.
newly_observed_defects.applied_fix: Replaced with 'Review the case and run outreach'.
newly_observed_defects.verified_live: PASS (live) — re-screenshot 02 captured 2026-06-15T08:52Z confirms new subtitle and no role tokens visible.

newly_observed_defects.where: src/components/facilitation/FacilitationCaseDrawer.tsx — Timeline section + OwnerPicker SelectItem + Outcome SelectItem
newly_observed_defects.observed: Timeline rows rendered raw event codes (facilitation_case.created → new, facilitation_case.evidence_uploaded, facilitation_case.closed → closed_admin). Assign owner dropdown showed 'Josh Kruger · platform_admin'. Final-outcome dropdown listed raw enum keys.
newly_observed_defects.applied_fix: Extended src/lib/facilitation-labels.ts with TIMELINE_ACTION_LABEL + timelineActionLabel(), OUTCOME_LABEL + outcomeLabel(), and ROLE_LABEL + roleLabel()/rolesLabel(). Drawer Timeline now renders 'Case created → New', 'Evidence uploaded', 'Case closed → Closed · Closed by admin'. OwnerPicker renders 'Platform admin' instead of 'platform_admin'. Final-outcome dropdown renders plain-English outcomes. Raw codes remain in audit logs/payloads only.
newly_observed_defects.verified_live: PASS (live) — screenshot 02 re-captured 2026-06-15T09:32Z. Timeline now reads 'Case created → New', 'Evidence uploaded', 'Case closed → Closed by admin'. OwnerPicker reads 'Josh Kruger · Platform admin'. No raw event codes, no raw outcome enum keys, and no raw role tokens visible.

add candidate end-to-end (gate result green/warning/block) — requires test counterparty + template
warn-ack-then-send + duplicate-send guard — depends on a real send with a seeded template
open escalation + send-blocked-while-open — depends on a sent outreach + escalation row
add DNC rule end-to-end — agent did not commit destructive writes against the user's live preview org without explicit go-ahead

verdict_reason: Live single-role pass confirms platform_admin UI surfaces render cleanly with prior EMB-1..EMB-4 fixes. EMB-5 is live-verified resolved. EMB-6 label-leak fix has been applied (timeline action labels, outcome labels, role labels); re-capture of the Triage screenshot is the only remaining task before the cosmetic surface is fully clean. Live click-throughs for compliance_analyst and requester/trader, plus destructive platform_admin flows against seeded fixtures, remain operator-driven and block CLIENT_UAT_READY.
